_readme: Drop rigged humanoid GLBs (Meshy/Tripo/Mixamo auto-rig, T-pose or A-pose) into public/models/ and add an entry per mech id. Fields: url (required), bindPose ('tpose'|'apose'|'native' or {joint:[x,y,z] degrees}), boneOverrides ({jointName: 'ExactBoneName'}), heightScale, yawOffset (deg), emissiveBoost. Mechs without an entry use the built-in procedural model. See docs/CHARACTER_PIPELINE.md.
